meta.title: S4x19 ICS Detection Challenge Results
meta.description:
A real world test of product's ability to create an ICS asset inventory and detect and analyze attacks on ICS via passive monitoring. 130GB packet captures from a real ICS, anonymized and then a very complex attack scenario is inserted. In the end only Dragos and Kaspersky stepped up to the Challenge. 

We gave them 10 minutes to put together a video showing how they detected and analyzed the attack using their products.

10:40 The Attack Scenario
17:40 Kaspersky's Video Analysis of the Attack and an analysis of how they did
32:20 Drago's Video Analysis of the Attack and an analysis of how they did

Dale Peterson led the effort to capture the traffic and inventory. Ron Brash led the effort to create, insert and score the attack.
